prompt: Our account transfer process currently requires manual intervention for about 60% of incoming ACATs. The ops team is copying data between three systems and manually matching transfer items against our records. I want to automate this to get our STP rate above 90%. What approach should I take?

assertions.text: Defines or calculates STP rate and sets improvement targets
Identifies exception categories and auto-resolution patterns
Discusses API vs RPA integration approaches for legacy systems
Outlines 5+ steps or phases in the automation approach
Identifies 3+ distinct edge cases or pitfalls in transfer automation
Focus is on end-to-end automation and exception handling, not task routing or approvals
